# Lamb Insurance Agency

> Lamb Insurance Agency is a local insurance agency serving Sarasota, FL. Cody Lamb is a licensed Florida insurance agent (Property & Casualty, Life & Health) helping drivers, homeowners, and business owners get properly protected.

## Pages

- [Home](https://lambinsuranceagency.com): Overview of insurance services offered in Sarasota, FL
- [About](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/about): About Cody Lamb and Lamb Insurance Agency
- [Auto Insurance](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/auto-insurance-sarasota-fl): Auto insurance in Sarasota, FL
- [Flood Insurance](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/flood-insurance-sarasota-fl): Flood insurance in Sarasota, FL
- [Condo Insurance](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/condo-insurance-sarasota-fl): Condo insurance in Sarasota, FL
- [Bundle Insurance](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/bundle-insurance-sarasota-fl): Bundle insurance discounts in Sarasota, FL
- [Commercial Insurance](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/commercial-insurance-sarasota-fl): Commercial insurance for businesses in Sarasota, FL
- [Get a Quote](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/quote): Request an insurance quote
- [En Español](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/espanol): Insurance services in Spanish / Servicios de seguro en español
- [FAQ](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about insurance coverage
- [Privacy Policy](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/privacy-policy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://lambinsuranceagency.com/terms): Terms of service
